original_incident: Forklift malfunctioned and dropped a load in the warehouse
summary: A malfunction with the forklift resulted in a load being dropped in the warehouse, posing a safety risk.
action: Inspect and service the forklift immediately; ensure all operators are re-trained on equipment usage.

original_incident: Smoke detected near electrical panel in storage room
summary: Smoke was detected in proximity to the electrical panel located in the storage room, indicating a potential fire hazard.
action: Evacuate the area immediately and contact emergency services. Conduct a thorough inspection of the electrical panel and the surrounding area.

original_incident: Worker slipped near stairs and injured shoulder
summary: A worker experienced a slip and fall incident near the stairs, resulting in a shoulder injury.
action: Install anti-slip mats near the stairs and conduct a safety training session on proper stair navigation.
